title: Webbia canariensis
taxonomy: Webbia canariensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Webbia, which is a small group of plants native to the Canary Islands and North Africa. The plant is also known as the Canary Island webbia or the webbia. The classification of Webbia canariensis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plant species.
